data.title: Binance Futures will update leverage and margin tiers for IPUSDT, BANUSDT, and OMUSDT U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers of IPUSDT, BANUSDT and OMUSDT U-margin perpetual contracts at 15:30 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on February 23, 2025. Due to the update of leverage and margin tiers, the contract grid strategy may be affected and terminated. Users are advised to make corresponding adjustments in time before the change.

data.title: Bybit may have purchased a total of 106,498 ETH in the past day or so
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the address (0x2E4...b77) that may be Bybit or its affiliates received another 34,743 ETH (US$97.75 million) from Wintermute 20 minutes ago. They are likely to have purchased a total of 106,498 ETH (US$294.93 million) in the past day or so: through Galaxy Digital, FalconX, and Wintermute. This address first received ETH after receiving 100 million USDT from Bybit's cold wallet and transferring it to FalconX and Galaxy Digital. Galaxy Digital, FalconX, and Wintermute all transferred ETH from various CEXs to the 0x2E4...b77 address, and they should have all bought it on the secondary market.

data.title: Today, the Fear and Greed Index rebounded slightly to 50, and the level is still neutral.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Alternative data, today's Fear and Greed Index rose slightly compared to yesterday, and has now risen to 50 (yesterday's 49), and the level is still neutral.
Note: The threshold of the Fear Index is 0-100, including indicators: volatility (25%) + market trading volume (25%) + social media heat (15%) + market research (15%) + Bitcoin's proportion in the entire market (10%) + Google hot word analysis (10%).

data.description:

While the analyst believes […]

data.title: =nil; Foundation raises $600,000 through LEGION community round
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: ZK infrastructure and Ethereum scalability solution developer =nil;Foundation tweeted that it has raised $600,000 through the LEGION community round, aiming to accelerate the introduction of zkSharding on the Ethereum chain.

data.title: CZ responds to Kanye West and has sent him a private message
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ has responded to Kanye West on the X platform and sent him a private message. The content of the private message has not been disclosed publicly, but the relevant content posted by Kanye West has been deleted.
Earlier news, Kanye West frequently retweeted CZ's tweets this morning and followed CZ's account, but then unfollowed CZ and followed Polychain founder Olaf Carlson-Wee. According to the analysis of crypto KOL @lokithebird, Kanye West may have transferred (or hosted) his X account to BarkMeta Doginals for $17 million.

data.title: QUAI rose above 0.28 USDT. Since its launch on LBank, the highest increase has exceeded 620%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows: QUAI rose above 0.28 USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.289 USDT, and is now quoted at 0.26 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 140%. Since the launch of LBank, the current maximum increase has exceeded 620%, and the current market value is approximately US$123 million.

data.title: 34742.6 ETH transferred from Wintermute to an address that interacted with the Bybit deposit address
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Arkham data shows that 34742.6 ETH were transferred from Wintermute to an address that interacted with the Bybit deposit address.
On-chain data shows that the address received 34,862.5 ETH from FalconX and Galaxy Digital early this morning and then transferred it to Bybit.

data.title: CZ: We will conduct various attempts on 0x288 wallet assets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted on the X platform: "I might combine these funds (0x288...) to see which method works better.
Many people suggest donating to charity, and I support this idea. I like to use cryptocurrency for charitable donations. My charitable donation requirements are that the receiving organization must support cryptocurrency and allow the ultimate beneficiary of the funds to be tracked and transparent. Suggestions are welcome.
Some people suggest destroying the received tokens. I can understand this angle, haha.
Airdrops require more operational energy, and choosing airdrop targets will also cause more "controversy."
Some people suggest adding funds to the liquidity pool. I did some testing yesterday and I feel like I finally got the hang of it. For this address, the MEV experience is very obvious. It was really a good learning experience and it gave me a fun weekend. Although it was a few years late, it finally started.
At present, I tend to do more work to support liquidity. I don't care how much money the funds on this address will make or lose, and I think this is also an indirect way to give back to our community."

data.title: Warren Buffett is rapidly dumping stocks and stacking cash. What’s he planning for?
data.description:
Warren Buffett is selling off billions in stocks and hoarding more cash than ever, but no one knows why.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/warren-buffett-dumping-stocks-stacking-cash/
